questions.question: Describe the typical architecture of a data warehouse and its relation to a Hadoop environment. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Explain the role of data mart, ETL tool and data governance in the data warehouse architecture.

questions.question: What is the primary difference between a data warehouse and a Hadoop environment? Provide supporting reasons. (8 marks)
questions.hint: Focus on data storage, processing, and scalability.

questions.question: Explain the concept of data lake and its relationship with Hadoop environment. (12 marks)
questions.hint: Discuss the characteristics of a data lake and its benefits in handling big data.
